events.text:
Analysis complete. Written to `/app/answer.json`:

- **Workable now:** `G` (Plumbing top-out) and `H` (HVAC rough) — both depend only on `E`, which is complete; neither depends on the held `F`.
- **Blocked:** `F` itself (on indefinite hold), plus `I` (Rough inspection, requires F+G+H) and everything downstream of `I` (`J, K, L, M, N, O, P, Q`) — transitively blocked even though G and H can finish, since I needs all three.
- Flagged `decision: needs_more_info` (indefinite hold pending material delivery, no recovery date), `risk: high` since the critical path is fully stalled past day 23.
